zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Verney於1445年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，她的父親Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London35歲，母親Emma Piking33歲。她於1467年與Edward Raleigh Esquire在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾法爾波洛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國瓦維其可爾法爾波洛享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Verney于1445年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London35岁，母亲Emma Piking33岁。她于1467年与Edward Raleigh Esquire在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾法爾波洛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国瓦維其可爾法爾波洛享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Verney was born in 1445, in London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, was 35 and her mother, Emma Piking, was 33. She married Edward Raleigh Esquire in 1467, in Farnborough, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1510, in Farnborough, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Verney est née en 1445, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Emma Piking, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Raleigh Esquire en 1467, à Farnborough, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Farnborough, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Verneyが1445年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of Londonは35歳，母Emma Pikingは33歳であった。1467年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアファルンボロウでEdward Raleigh Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアファルンボロウで65歳で死去した。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Verney(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Piking(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 패른버루에서 Edward Raleigh Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 워윅실르 패른버루에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Verney родилась в 1445 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Piking, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Raleigh Esquire в 1467 г. в местности фарнбороую, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности фарнбороую, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Verney nació en 1445, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Emma Piking, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Edward Raleigh Esquire en 1467, en Farnborough, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1510, en Farnborough, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
